message:
feat(core): integrate resize control-plane snapshots into IPC health and CLI robot health

Wire the new `ResizeSchedulerDebugSnapshot::get_global()` singleton
into both the IPC health response and the CLI `robot health` command:

ipc.rs (+12 lines):
- When the global resize snapshot is present, serialize it as
  `resize_control_plane` alongside a `resize_control_plane_stalled`
  array (transactions exceeding 2 s age threshold)
- When absent, emit explicit JSON nulls so consumers can distinguish
  "scheduler not initialized" from "no transactions"

main.rs (+15/-2 lines):
- Update the `Health` command description to mention resize
  control-plane lifecycle/stall introspection
- Mirror the IPC logic in the robot-mode health JSON: embed
  `resize_control_plane` and `resize_control_plane_stalled` fields
  using `now_epoch_ms()` as the time reference

This gives operators and watchdog scripts first-class visibility into
resize transaction state without requiring direct scheduler access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
